title: Japanese Savory Pancake with Shungiku
description: A crispy Japanese savory pancake filled with the subtle flavor of shungiku. Serve as a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
Gradually add in the water and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add in the crumbled pancake and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and brush with vegetable oil.
Pour in the batter and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the other side is golden brown.
Add in the chopped shungiku and cook for 1 minute or until wilted.
